ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agribusiness, Communications/Electronics) */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sector was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector making the contribution */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Election cycle year */,
  "indivs" INTEGER /* Amount of individual contributions */,
  "pacs" INTEGER /* Amount of PAC contributions */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total contributions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the contribution data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the contribution data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the candidate represents */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is running for */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Election status of the candidate (e.g., Won, Lost, Running) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Super PAC, PAC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the committee was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the committee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution being tracked */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Election cycle year */,
  "indivs" INTEGER /* Amount of individual contributions */,
  "pacs" INTEGER /* Amount of PAC contributions */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total contributions */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_history_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Data Entry Clerk, Analyst, Auditor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_contributions" (
  "candidate_contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate contribution entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the contribution */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_contributions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_contributions_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_contributions" (
  "committee_contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee contribution entry */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee receiving the contribution */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_contributions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_contributions_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the reporting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting period */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* Name of the imported file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
